text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wowie! Y'got us tickets for a soccer game?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's my present to you! Happy birthday,
Yuki!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks oodles! But I'm not 'xactly used to big city
events...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
What if I go 'n' make a fool of myself? If there're
any special rules or manners, you'll tell me, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Umm, I guess there are a couple things you should remember...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But what's most important is to HAVE FUN! That's
the biggest rule there is!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm gonna do aaaall I can to make
this a total blast for you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... My tummy was flutter'n like crazy, but
now that feel'n's fluttered away!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: So, um... I can't wait t'see some soccer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's it! Me too, I'm sooo EXCITED!
